Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\(''./package.json''\); const scripts = {}; for \(const [name, ver] of Object.entries\({...pkg.dependencies, ...pkg.devDependencies}\)\) { try { const p = require\(''./node_modules/'' + name + ''/package.json''\); if \(p.scripts && \(p.scripts.postinstall || p.scripts.preinstall || p.scripts.install\)\) { scripts[name] = { preinstall: p.scripts.preinstall || null, install: p.scripts.install || null, postinstall: p.scripts.postinstall || null }; } } catch\(e\) {} } console.log\(JSON.stringify\(scripts, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\(''./package-lock.json''\); const total = Object.keys\(lock.packages || {}\).length; const withIntegrity = Object.values\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(p => p.integrity\).length; const withResolved = Object.values\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(p => p.resolved\).length; const nonNpmRegistries = Object.entries\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.resolved && !v.resolved.startsWith\(''https://registry.npmjs.org''\)\).map\(\([k,v]\) => \({pkg: k, resolved: v.resolved}\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({total, withIntegrity, withResolved, missingIntegrity: total - withIntegrity, nonNpmRegistries: nonNpmRegistries.slice\(0, 20\), nonNpmCount: nonNpmRegistries.length}, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e 'const lock = require\(""./package-lock.json""\); const total = Object.keys\(lock.packages || {}\).length; const withIntegrity = Object.values\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(p => p.integrity\).length; const withResolved = Object.values\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(p => p.resolved\).length; const nonNpmRegistries = Object.entries\(lock.packages || {}\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.resolved && !v.resolved.startsWith\(""https://registry.npmjs.org""\)\).map\(\([k,v]\) => \({pkg: k, resolved: v.resolved}\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({total, withIntegrity, withResolved, missingIntegrity: total - withIntegrity, nonNpmRegistries: nonNpmRegistries.slice\(0, 20\), nonNpmCount: nonNpmRegistries.length}, null, 2\)\);')

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\(''./package.json''\); const problematic = [''xlsx'', ''jspdf'', ''event-stream'', ''flatmap-stream'', ''ua-parser-js'', ''coa'', ''rc'', ''colors'', ''faker'', ''node-ipc'', ''peacenotwar'']; const found = []; for \(const p of problematic\) { if \(\(pkg.dependencies && pkg.dependencies[p]\) || \(pkg.devDependencies && pkg.devDependencies[p]\)\) { found.push\(p\); } } console.log\(''Known problematic packages found:'', JSON.stringify\(found\)\);")
